metadata.title: True Colors
metadata.lyrics:
[00:15.51] You with the sad eyes, don't be discouraged
[00:21.83] Oh, I realize it's hard to take courage
[00:27.76] In a world full of people, you can lose sight of it all
[00:33.25] And the darkness inside you make you feel so small
[00:37.85] But I see your true color shining through
[00:43.50] I see your true colors, and that's why I love you
[00:49.76] So don't be afraid to let them show
[00:55.30] Your true colors
[00:58.39] True colors are beautiful, like a rainbow
[01:08.24] 
[01:14.16] Show me a smile then
[01:17.99] Don't be unhappy, can't remember when
[01:23.27] I last saw you laughing
[01:26.22] If this world makes you crazy
[01:28.72] And you've taken all you can bear
[01:31.67] You call me up because you know I'll be there
[01:36.76] And I'll see your true colors shining through
[01:42.44] I see your true colors, and that's why I love you
[01:48.76] So don't be afraid to let it show
[01:54.01] Your true colors
[01:57.46] Your true colors are beautiful, like a rainbow
[02:07.47] 
[02:13.88] (Can't remember when I last saw you laugh)
[02:25.66] If this world makes you crazy
[02:27.85] You've taken all you can bear
[02:30.53] You call me up
[02:32.45] Because you know I'll be there
[02:35.10] And I'll see your true colors shinin' through
[02:40.68] I see your true colors, and that's why I love you
[02:47.24] So don't be afraid to let it show
[02:52.49] Your true colors
[02:55.83] True colors
[02:58.68] True colors are shining through
[03:03.21] I see your true colors, and that's why I love you
[03:09.56] So don't be afraid to let them show
[03:15.05] Your true colors
[03:18.66] True colors are beautiful, like a rainbow
[03:29.92]
